title: Netify Intelligence Telemetry
description: JSON Schema for Netify Agent v5 flow intelligence telemetry.

interface.description: Interface name associated with the flow.

internal.description: Indicates whether the flow is internal to the local network context.

flow.description: Container for per-flow statistics and intelligence data.

intel.description: Array of intelligence indicator objects associated with the flow.

intelAttributes.description: Intelligence indicator object containing risk and detection context.

category.description: Intelligence category tag associated with the indicator.

criteria.description: Resolved criteria values used when evaluating the indicator.

event.description: Detection lifecycle event that triggered the indicator.

indicator.description: Configured tag of the indicator that generated the detection.

indicator_driver.description: Tag of the driver that powered the detection.

score.description: Risk/severity score assigned to the indicator.
